category_note: oOh!media operates large format roadside (LF), small format retail (SF), street furniture, fly transit, retail and place-based panels. Specs vary per panel format and per individual site. Always confirm exact pixel dimensions with oOh! account manager when booking.
source: STUB ENTRY — oOh! media publishes specs per booking. Download the specific spec sheet from oOh! when the line items are confirmed.

formats.dimensions: Varies per site — common sizes include 1400x400px, 1920x432px, 1440x912px. Confirm per site code with oOh! account manager.
formats.file_type: JPEG or PNG (digital), HTML5 on enquiry
formats.creative_type: Static (10s slot rotation typical) or Animated subject to site capability
formats.supply_deadline_rule: 5-10 working days before live date (confirm per booking)
best_practice_notes: Test legibility at viewing distance (large format = brief glance)
No more than 6-8 words on copy-led creative

formats.dimensions: Varies per panel — common is 1080x1920 portrait. Confirm per site.
formats.file_type: JPEG or PNG (static), MP4 (animated where supported)
best_practice_notes: Retail context — shoppers in browsing mindset
Product-led or value-led creative typically outperforms brand awareness
Keep copy short, legible at close range

formats.file_type: JPEG or PNG (digital), CMYK print files for static
formats.supply_deadline_rule: Static requires longer lead time (10-14 working days for production and installation)

supply_deadline_general: Digital: 5-10 working days before live. Static (street furniture, classic): 10-14 working days for printing and installation. Confirm per booking.
refresh_instructions: Download the oOh! Creative Specifications PDF from the oOh! Hub or via account manager
Use scripts/save_to_library.py to merge structured spec records
